_comment: Add to ~/.claude/settings.json. Fires cc-mem-ingest right after each compaction so the summary is captured before context moves on. Requires a local `pip install cc-mem-mcp` (or replace the command with the docker variant below).
_docker_variant: docker run --rm -v cc-mem-data:/data -v "$HOME/.claude/projects:/projects:ro" -e CLAUDE_PROJECTS_DIR=/projects --entrypoint cc-mem-ingest cc-mem-mcp --once
